title: Ore UI, as Unintended
description: Adapting Bedrock's OreUI into Java, with Dark mode ;)
body:
# Get the Bedrock UI on Java with Dark mode!

Everyone wants the UI from Bedrock Edition in Java. 

Problem: Java's UI doesn't allow resource packs to fully accomplish this, and any attempt always has a UI that melts our eyes with light mode. (making the titlescreen unreadable!!!)

A modder could probably figure out how to accomplish this better, but they're all busy making more important mods 😔. In the meantime, here's Ore UI in Dark Mode! :)))

Want a mod supported? Send me suggestions!

Showcase
----------------
Ooh, Shiny!

![Enchanting Table Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uyReKFB1/images/70f9c502db639056f0af0a94165e458e705cd3fa.png)

The page that annoys everyone, now prettier!

![Caution](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/uyReKFB1/images/5a732282a789e50c5dfc9fe329cd30021a368eb7.png)

🎵 Can, We, Build, It?!🎵

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uyReKFB1/images/dcf2ad4f77414736011e50bf0ac65bbd3a5bc8ed.png)
------------
Use the Create mod? Use Bare Bones? Check out my other resource pack, [Bare Metals!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-metals)  

Contact
--------------
This might not be a Bare Bones addon, but please contact me through the Bare Bones discord server. Username: OneGunBullet
